positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Central focus on giant, bioluminescent flowers with petal structures resembling stained glass. The foliage should be stylized, incorporating celestial elements like crescent moons, orbiting planets, and nebulae patterns within the leaves. Utilize a strong Art Nouveau and psychedelic aesthetic blend. Color palette: deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, emerald green, accented by glowing gold and lavender luminescence. Composition must be contained within a clear circular or badge-like frame for printing. Intricate line work, graphic novel quality, volumetric lighting, clean silhouettes, highly detailed, wallpaper pattern element suitable for apparel.
negative: blurry, ugly, amateur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, missing features, noise, low contrast, monochrome, realistic photo, photo-realism
